title: Garden Villa
description:
Tucked into the fragrant gardens

A single-level villa wrapped in lavender and olive trees, with its own outdoor soaking tub and lounging pergola. Perfect for couples seeking privacy or a traveling guest with a four-legged companion.

  • King bed plus convertible daybed
  • Outdoor soaking tub and shower garden
  • Full lounging pergola with daybed
  • Dedicated villa attendant
